repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five selected memories address the exact redefinition error seen here: duplicate REG_OP (or OP_ADD) causing 'redefinition of class ge::op::XxxCustom' in op_proto.h during the opbuild stage. Although the ops differ (ca6k_00045, ca6k_00227, ca6k_00322, ca6k_00147, ca6k_00163), the root cause is identical to the current ca6k_00257 failure, making them highly relevant for avoiding the same mistake.
